title: Cobblemon: Comfey Cosmetics
description: Datapack that adds a lot of new cosmetics for Comfey!
body:
Change the appearance of your Comfey by giving it a specific minecraft flower! Simply shift + right click on your comfey, and give it a specific minecraft item to change its texture. There will be more cosmetics in the future updates.

**CURRENT COSMETICS:**

-Allium

-Azure Bluet

-Blue Orchid

-Cornflower

-Oxeye Daisy

-Lily of the Valley

-Pink/White/Orange/Red Tulip

-Poppy

-Dandelion

-Torchflower (Sniffer like appearence + unique shiny!)

-Wither Rose (Wither like appearance + unique shiny!)


**_special forms_**

-Classic Dandelion _(give Comfey yellow dye as a cosmetic item)_

-Classic Rose _(give Comfey red dye as a cosmetic item)_


**HOW TO INSTALL?**

Put the zip file inside your datapacks folder for your singleplayer/multiplayer world.

Make sure to also put the file inside your resourcepack folder.
